[math]\\begin{array}{l}\\left\\{g(i)+\\frac{1}{f(i)}\\right\\}=1-i+\\frac{1}{1+i} \\\\=1-i+\\frac{1-i}{(1+i)(1-i)}=1-i+\\frac{1-i}{1-i^{2}} \\\\=1-i+\\frac{1-i}{1-(-1)}=1-i+\\frac{1-i}{2} }^{n} C_{r+1}[/math]\u003Cbr\u003Eপ্রশ্নমতে, [math]{ }^{n} C_{r-1}+{ }^{n} C_{r+1}=2 .{ }^{n} C_{r}[/math]\u003Cbr\u003E [math]= \\frac{n !}{(r-1) !(n-r+1) !}+\\frac{n !}{(r+1) !(n-r-1) !}[/math]\u003Cbr\u003E [math]=2 \\frac{n !}{r !(n-r) !}[/math]\u003Cbr\u003E [math]= \\frac{1}{(r-1) !(n-r+1)(n-r) \\cdot(n-r-1) !}[/math]\u003Cbr\u003E [math]+\\frac{1}{(r+1) \\cdot r(r-1) !(n-r-1) !}[/math]\u003Cbr\u003E [math]\\begin{array}{l}=\\frac{2}{r \\cdot(r-1) ! \\cdot(n-r) \\cdot(n-r-1) !}\\\\= \\frac{1}{(n-r+1)(n-r)}+\\frac{1}{(r+1) \\cdot r}=\\frac{2}{r \\cdot(n-r)}\\\\= \\frac{1}{(n-r+1)(n-r)}-\\frac{1}{r \\cdot(n-r)}=\\frac{1}{r \\cdot(n-r)}-\\frac{1}{(r+1) \\cdot r}\\\\= \\frac{r-n+r-1}{(n-r+1)(n-r) \\cdot r}=\\frac{r+1-n+r}{r \\cdot(n-r)(r+1)}\\\\= \\frac{2 r-n-1}{n-r+1}=\\frac{2 r-n+1}{r+1} \\text{.}\\\\= 2 r^{2}-n r-r+2 r-n-1\\\\=2 r n-n^{2}+n-2 r^{2}+n r-r+2 r-n+1\\\\= n^{2}-4 n r-n+4 r^{2}-2=0\\end{array}[/math]\u003Cbr\u003E [math]\\therefore
